items.title: Prediction Markets Scale to $21B Monthly Volume in 2026
items.summary: Prediction market trading volume surged to $21 billion per month in 2026, driven primarily by geopolitical, macroeconomic, and political events rather than cryptocurrency speculation. The user base tripled, positioning these platforms as real-time indicators of global economic and political sentiment.
items.domain_relevance: Macro sentiment indicator; prediction markets reflect real-time global macro expectations
